entries.statement: Develop and maintain data and AI program plans, including scope definition, data governance frameworks, standards and policies, workforce requirements assessment, and resource allocation strategies.

Manage ongoing data and AI program operations, including monitoring execution schedules, coordinating responses to operational issues, automating routine operations, and capacity planning for anticipated resource needs.

Conduct program reviews and continuous improvement activities, including documenting lessons learned, analyzing feedback results, preparing assessment reports, testing and validating improvements, and auditing programs.

Design and deliver data and AI training and adoption programs, including needs assessment, curriculum development, training materials creation, delivery execution, effectiveness measurement, and AI adoption strategy integration.

Manage data management systems and infrastructure, including data requirements definition, standards implementation, data administration, test data management, database management, and data governance policies.

Develop and deliver data and AI literacy programs for organizational audiences, including curriculum and training material design, on-the-job training programs, delivery facilitation, and effectiveness assessment.

Manage data operations and system reliability, including monitoring execution schedules, investigating failures, planning data recovery and redundancy procedures, implementing observability and telemetry infrastructure, and analyzing operational patterns.

Conduct evaluations of data and AI tools and platforms, including requirements definition, vendor engagement, proof-of-concept design and execution, technical and commercial assessment, testing and compliance evaluation, and selection recommendation.

Manage operational budgets and financial resources for data and AI programs, including cost forecasting, expenditure tracking, variance analysis, financial reporting, and cost optimization recommendations.

Develop and maintain operational documentation for data and AI systems, including standard operating procedures, runbooks, system security documentation, knowledge base articles, technical documentation, and process diagrams.

Manage data service level agreements and operational commitments with internal consumers, including SLA definition, performance measurement, monitoring program execution, breach reporting, and service improvement planning.

Conduct capacity planning and trend analysis for data infrastructure, including growth projection analysis, resource utilization trending, capacity requirement changes analysis, scaling recommendations, and strategic planning with partners.

Design and deliver AI risk management and compliance training programs, including curriculum development for risk management teams, delivery execution, trainer qualification, and effectiveness measurement for AI governance and compliance personnel.
